verses.text: Tu-in Topa in Moses leh Aaron' kiangah

“ Topa' thupiak thukham leh ngeina hih bang ahi hi: Poina a neilo, sitbaan'na a omlo, a tungah nasepna kol a kivawh ngei nailo, bawngla a san khat nomau kiangah hong paipihna dingun Israel mite kiangah gen un
Siampi Eleazar kiangah na pia ding uh a, giahphual pualamah kipaipihin ama mai-ah kigo ding hi
Siampi Eleazar in a khutme tawh a si tawmkhat la-in, kikhopna buk mailamah a si sagihvei theh ding hi
Ama muhna-ah a bawngla kihal ding a, a vun, a sa, leh a si, a ek tawh kihal ding hi
Siampipa in taamtak sing leh puknah leh a ausan khaute la-in bawngla a kihalna sungah tuate khul ding hi
Tua ciangin siampipa in ama puante sawpin tui sungah kipumsil ding a, tua khit ciangin giahphualah hong pai ding hi. A nitak mateng siampipa a nin hi ding hi
Bawngla a hal mipa in ama puante sawpin tui sungah kipumsil ding a, a nitak mateng a nin hi ding hi

Mi a siang khat in bawngla vu khawmin, giahphual pualam a siang mun khatah tuate koih ding a, khialhna maisakna ding, nitna sian'sakna ding tui-ah zat dingin Israel mihonpite-a' dingin tuate kikem ding hi
Bawngla vute a khawm mipa in ama puante sawpin, a nitak mateng a nin hi ding hi. Hih pen Israel mite leh amaute lakah a peem khualmi tungah tawntung ngeina hi ding hi
“Misi luang khatpeuh a lawngpa ni sagih sung a nin hi ding hi

A ni thum ni leh a ni sagih ni-in amahmah tui tawh kisiangsakin, tua khit ciangin a siang hi ding hi. Ahih hangin a ni thum ni leh a ni sagih ni-in amahmah a kisian'sak kei leh, amah a siang suak theilo ding hi

Misi khatpeuh a lawng mi in amahmah a kisian'sak tawm kei leh amahmah in Topa' biakbuk a ninsak hi a, Israel sung panin tua mi kihawlkhia ding hi. Nitna hangin ama tungah tui kibuaklo ahih manin ama tungah nitna baang lai ahih ciangin a nin hi ding hi
“Mi khat puanbuk sungah a sih ciangin puanbuk sungah a pai mi peuhmah leh puanbuk sungah a om mi peuhmah ni sagih sung a nin hi ding hi
A kisinciplo a kihong beel peuhmah a nin ahi hi
Namsau tawh gamlakah a kithat mi ahi a, misi pumpi ahi a, mi guh ahi a, han ahi zongin a lawng mi peuhmah ni sagih sung a nin hi ding hi
“Amaute in a nin mipa-a' dingin a kihal khialhna hanga biakna vute la-in beel sung khatah tui luanglai tawh hel ding uh hi

Tua ciangin a siang mi khat in puknah la-in a sungah diah ding a, puanbuk tung leh a nazat khempeuh tung leh tua lai-ah a om mi khempeuh tung leh guh ahi a, a kithat mi ahi a, misi ahi a, han ahi zongin a lawng mipa tungah theh ding hi

A ni thum ni leh a ni sagih ni-in a siang mipa in a nin mipa tungah theh ding a, tua bangin a ni sagih ni-in amah in mi ninpa siangsakin, amah in a puante sawpin, tui sungah kipumsil ding a, a nitak ciangin amah a siang hi ding hi
“Ahih hangin a nin hi napi-in a kisiangsaklo mipa in Topa' biakbuk ninsak ahih manin mihonpi panin tua mipa kihawlkhia ding hi. Nitna hangin ama tungah tui kibuaklo ahih manin amah a nin ahi hi
Tua pen amaute-a' dingin tawntung ngeina khat hi ding hi. Nitna hangin tui a theh mipa in ama puante sawp ding a, nitna hangin a kizang tui a lawng mipa a nitak mateng a nin hi ding hi
A nin mipa in a lawn' na khat peuhpeuh a nin hi ding a, tua na a lawng peuhpeuh zong a nitak mateng a nin hi ding hi,” a ci hi.
